title: Crunchy Spanish Octopus Pulpo A La Gallega
description: A traditional Spanish dish featuring tender octopus and crunchy texture, perfect for a midnight craving. This recipe is egg-free and friendly for various dietary needs.

ingredients.name: octopus
ingredients.notes: cleaned and cut into bite-sized pieces

instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large stone bowl or dolsot over medium-high heat.
Add the garlic and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the octopus and cook for 3-4 minutes, until browned and tender.
Add the smoked paprika, dried mint, salt, and black pepper, and stir to combine.
Squeeze the lemon juice over the top and stir to combine.
Cook for an additional 1-2 minutes, until the flavors are combined and the octopus is coated.
Remove from heat and let cool slightly.
Serve hot, garnished with additional dried mint if desired.
